message: fix: defer live audio initialization before onboarding

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,140 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+APP_PATH="${1:-${GHOST_PEPPER_APP_PATH:-}}"
+
+if [[ -z "$APP_PATH" ]]; then
+  echo "usage: $0 /path/to/GhostPepper.app" >&2
+  exit 64
+fi
+
+INFO_PLIST="$APP_PATH/Contents/Info.plist"
+APP_BINARY="$APP_PATH/Contents/MacOS/GhostPepper"
+
+if [[ ! -f "$INFO_PLIST" || ! -x "$APP_BINARY" ]]; then
+  echo "error: $APP_PATH is not a GhostPepper.app bundle" >&2
+  exit 66
+fi
+
+BUNDLE_ID=$(/usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Print :CFBundleIdentifier" "$INFO_PLIST")
+WINDOW_TITLE=$(/usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Print :CFBundleDisplayName" "$INFO_PLIST")
+BACKUP_DIR=$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/ghostpepper-smoke.XXXXXX")
+BACKUP_PLIST="$BACKUP_DIR/preferences.plist"
+KEEP_ARTIFACTS=0
+HAD_PREFERENCES=0
+
+cleanup() {
+  if [[ -n "${APP_PID:-}" ]]; then
+    kill "$APP_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
+    wait "$APP_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
+  fi
+
+  if [[ "$HAD_PREFERENCES" -eq 1 ]]; then
+    defaults import "$BUNDLE_ID" "$BACKUP_PLIST" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
+  else
+    defaults delete "$BUNDLE_ID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
+  fi
+
+  if [[ "$KEEP_ARTIFACTS" -eq 0 ]]; then
+    rm -rf "$BACKUP_DIR"
+  fi
+}
+
+trap cleanup EXIT
+
+capture_pid() {
+  local current_pid
+  for current_pid in $(pgrep -f "$APP_PATH/Contents/MacOS/GhostPepper" || true); do
+    if [[ " ${BEFORE_PIDS:-} " != *" $current_pid "* ]]; then
+      echo "$current_pid"
+      return 0
+    fi
+  done
+
+  return 1
+}
+
+ui_state() {
+  osascript - "$APP_PID" "$WINDOW_TITLE" <<'APPLESCRIPT' 2>/dev/null || printf 'automation-denied'
+on run argv
+  set pidNumber to (item 1 of argv) as integer
+  set expectedWindowTitle to item 2 of argv
+
+  tell application "System Events"
+    try
+      set targetProcess to first application process whose unix id is pidNumber
+    on error
+      return "missing-process"
+    end try
+
+    tell targetProcess
+      set onboardingWindows to windows whose name is expectedWindowTitle
+      if (count of onboardingWindows) = 0 then
+        return "no-window"
+      end if
+
+      tell item 1 of onboardingWindows
+        if (count of sheets) > 0 then
+          return "sheet-present"
+        end if
+      end tell
+
+      return "ready"
+    end tell
+  end tell
+end run
+APPLESCRIPT
+}
+
+if defaults export "$BUNDLE_ID" - >"$BACKUP_PLIST" 2>/dev/null; then
+  HAD_PREFERENCES=1
+fi
+
+BEFORE_PIDS="$(pgrep -f "$APP_PATH/Contents/MacOS/GhostPepper" || true)"
+defaults write "$BUNDLE_ID" onboardingCompleted -bool false >/dev/null 2>&1
+tccutil reset Microphone "$BUNDLE_ID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
+open -na "$APP_PATH"
+
+STATE="unknown"
+for _ in $(seq 1 40); do
+  if [[ -z "${APP_PID:-}" ]]; then
+    APP_PID=$(capture_pid || true)
+    if [[ -z "${APP_PID:-}" ]]; then
+      sleep 0.5
+      continue
+    fi
+  fi
+
+  STATE=$(ui_state)
+  if [[ "$STATE" == "ready" || "$STATE" == "sheet-present" || "$STATE" == "automation-denied" ]]; then
+    break
+  fi
+
+  sleep 0.5
+done
+
+if [[ "$STATE" == "ready" ]]; then
+  for _ in $(seq 1 6); do
+    if ! kill -0 "$APP_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+      STATE="exited"
+      break
+    fi
+
+    STATE=$(ui_state)
+    if [[ "$STATE" != "ready" ]]; then
+      break
+    fi
+
+    sleep 0.5
+  done
+fi
+
+if [[ "$STATE" == "ready" ]]; then
+  echo "PASS: onboarding window appeared without an early modal permission sheet"
+  exit 0
+fi
+
+KEEP_ARTIFACTS=1
+echo "FAIL: smoke onboarding state was '$STATE'" >&2
+echo "preferences backup: $BACKUP_PLIST" >&2
+exit 1
